## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Testing

List the automated and manual checks you ran.

## Security and privacy

Describe any impact on Gmail access, OAuth scope, email content sent to model
providers, credentials, generated HTML, email headers, or SMTP transport.
Write `None` if not applicable.

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated where appropriate
- [ ] Documentation updated where appropriate
- [ ] No credentials, OAuth data, private email content, or generated artifacts committed
- [ ] Backward compatibility and configuration impact considered
- [ ] OAuth remains read-only and SMTP authentication remains protected by TLS
